response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of fullstack experience spanning TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB in production settings, and current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling directly matches the AI agent development requirement. A strong testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, ran testing workshops) and DevOps/Kubernetes experience round out the profile. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin experience and limited stated PostgreSQL exposure, all learnable given the depth elsewhere.
strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with core stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS
Current AI-agent and MCP code-generation work matches the AI agent development requirement
Deep testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored test libraries, taught workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, a primary framework for the role
Kotlin not listed; Java experience appears dated and secondary
Authentication/authorization and security practices not explicitly demonstrated on the resume

key_factors.factor: Hands-on AI agent and MCP tooling development
